title: asymmetric WalletStore balance API creates refactor trap
description: The send-side uses alice_store.balance(alice_scan_tip, 1) while the receive-side uses bob_store.balance_with_confirmations(1). These two methods have different signatures on WalletStore. If WalletStore is later refactored to consolidate them, one call will break at compile time and the other will not — the asymmetry is invisible at the call sites. The test should use one consistent method for both sides, or add a comment explaining why each form is used (e.g. Alice needs an explicit tip because the preloaded DB tip may differ from the live chain tip).
